title: Shibganj Heavy Rain
lead: Shibganj is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.06, indicating a highly unusual event. The Score of 10.0/10 and CRITICAL Level signify extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Shibganj is causing significant disruptions. 
 The Umidita of 87% and Vento of 7.5 km/h are contributing to the hazardous conditions. 
 The HDD of 0.0 GG and CDD of 9.7 GG are also notable factors in this extreme weather event.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions immediately.
